element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Jim's primary method of combat throughout all levels
Unlocks new locations within Jim's brain/mind chambers
Unlocks new levels within each mind chamber
Four mind chambers themed around Jim's worst fears; taken over by villains
Four villains occupy mind chambers; defeating them progresses story toward final confrontation
Personification of Jim's trauma; must defeat to restore sanity and escape coma

typical_relief_triggers: Safe hub areas (mind chambers between levels)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Progression-gated collection-based structure with boss encounters punctuating chamber exploration; narrative tension from coma setting provides meta-threat

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Golden Udders unlock optional mind chamber locations; collecting all Jim's Marbles unlocks all chamber levels

difficulty_curve.early_game: Safe introduction to blaster combat and collection mechanics within first mind chamber
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalating challenge as additional fear-themed chambers unlock; difficulty increases through level unlocks gated by marble collection
difficulty_curve.late_game: Boss encounters with villains controlling mind chambers; culminates in final trauma personification boss (Earthworm Kim)
notable_spikes: First boss encounter (Fear chamber with Professor Monkey-for-a-Head)
Final confrontation with Earthworm Kim (trauma personification)
Camera/navigation difficulty noted by critics affecting all combat scenarios

notable_level_patterns.description: Four distinct mind chambers themed around Jim's worst fears; each contains unlockable levels gated by marble collection and controlled by villain boss
Central mind chamber access point; Golden Udders unlock new chamber locations; Jim's Marbles unlock individual levels within each chamber
Golden Udders provide chamber unlocks; Jim's Marbles provide level unlocks within chambers; creates non-linear progression options within gated structure
